name: Chicken Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian plum tomatoes, coarsely chopped (24 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into serving-size pieces.
2. Season flour with salt, pepper, and cayenne.
3. Dredge chicken in seasoned flour to coat.
4. In a Dutch oven or similar heavy kettle, sauté onions, garlic, and bell pepper in olive oil until limp. Remove from pan.
5. Brown chicken in the same olive oil.
6. Add cooked onion mixture and remaining ingredients to the kettle.
7. Simmer over medium-low heat until chicken is cooked through, 30-40 minutes.
